fabric-versions.description: Query latest Minecraft, Fabric Loader, and Fabric API versions from fabricmc.net

tools.name: get_latest_mc_version
tools.description: Get the latest stable Minecraft version

tools.name: get_fabric_loader_version
tools.description: Get Fabric Loader version for a given MC version

tools.name: get_fabric_api_version
tools.description: Get latest Fabric API version for a given MC version

gradle-build.description: Execute Gradle commands and parse build output for errors

tools.name: gradle_build
tools.description: Run gradlew build and return output

tools.name: parse_gradle_errors
tools.description: Parse build output for compilation errors

modrinth-search.description: Search Modrinth for reference mods and resource packs

tools.name: search_mods
tools.description: Search Modrinth for mods matching a query

tools.name: get_mod_versions
tools.description: Get available versions for a mod

tools.name: search_resource_packs
tools.description: Search for weapon/armor texture resource packs
